# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Remediated the pending path-extraction issue in the bead project prompt renderer. Bare whitespace-token scanning is now limited to explicit \"Where to look\" sections, slash-containing tokens must pass stricter repo-path checks instead of any slash being accepted, and regression coverage prevents prose such as `AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md` or `backend / frontend review/fix` from creating bogus `Where to Look` entries.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree still contains orchestration/backlog state outside the source patch: `.beads/issues.jsonl`, `.ralph-burning/projects/4wdb-1/journal.ndjson`, and `.ralph-burning/projects/4wdb-1/run.json` are modified. Source changes are limited to `src/contexts/bead_workflow/project_prompt.rs` and `tests/unit/bead_project_prompt_test.rs`.","`cargo test` passed but emitted existing unused-code/import warnings in test builds; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passed cleanly."],"steps":[{"description":"Tightened `explicit_path_pointers` so bac
